actions.explanation: Hard walls Flying pressure but exposes a Water/Fighting team plan.
actions.name: Switch to Sudowoodo
actions.public_tradeoff: Maybe smart if Chuck preserves Poliwrath.

actions.explanation: Stops the bird if it lands.
actions.name: Hypnosis
actions.public_tradeoff: Swingy but leader-flavored.

actions.explanation: Coverage hit into the revealed Flying threat.
actions.name: Ice Punch
actions.public_tradeoff: Looks prepared without hidden information.

actions.explanation: High reward if the player does not attack, but Wing Attack is visible.
actions.name: Focus Punch
actions.public_tradeoff: Can look foolish when the threat is obvious.

complete_candidates.training_focus: Teach the boss to value visible coverage without pretending it knows the player's next move.

actions.explanation: Trades Golem to stop Vaporeon from sweeping.
actions.name: Explosion
actions.public_tradeoff: Can be dramatic or cheap.

actions.explanation: Setup while under direct Water pressure.
actions.name: Curse
actions.public_tradeoff: Likely too greedy.

actions.explanation: Preserves Golem and resists Water better.
actions.name: Switch to Omastar
actions.public_tradeoff: Defensive but sensible.

actions.explanation: Best normal damage while accepting Water risk.
actions.name: Earthquake
actions.public_tradeoff: Straightforward but maybe not enough.

complete_candidates.training_focus: Label whether a late-game Rock leader should trade Golem or preserve it under Water pressure.

actions.explanation: Places the third local Spikes layer.
actions.name: Spikes
actions.public_tradeoff: Converts future grounded switches and Rest cycles into much higher pressure.

actions.explanation: Sacrifices Qwilfish for tempo.
actions.name: Explosion
actions.public_tradeoff: Too early while Qwilfish can still finish the hazard stack.

actions.explanation: Direct poison STAB into Snorlax.
actions.name: Sludge Bomb
actions.public_tradeoff: Safe chip, but it does not change the hazard economy.

actions.explanation: Neutral Water coverage.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: No immediate KO is public.

actions.explanation: Preserves Qwilfish and brings in Janine's spinner.
actions.name: Switch to Tentacruel
actions.public_tradeoff: Gives up the open third-layer turn.

complete_candidates.training_focus: Janine's Qwilfish should finish the third Spikes layer when the player is grounded, no spin has been revealed, and no immediate KO threat is public.

actions.explanation: Keeps pressure while Rest is mechanically unavailable.
actions.name: Body Slam
actions.public_tradeoff: Does not cure paralysis, but at least advances the turn.

actions.explanation: Can build a route if Whirlwind does not erase the boost.
actions.name: Curse
actions.public_tradeoff: Still risks donating a phazing turn.

actions.explanation: Only useful while asleep.
actions.name: Sleep Talk
actions.public_tradeoff: Fails while awake.

actions.explanation: Would be a status cure below full HP.
actions.name: Rest
actions.public_tradeoff: Fails at full HP in the local engine before curing status.

complete_candidates.training_focus: Full-HP Rest is not a status cure in the local engine; the move fails before clearing status.

actions.explanation: Reduces future Rock-risk without pretending to know the player's exact move.
actions.name: Sand Attack
actions.public_tradeoff: Annoying but fair if used sparingly.

actions.explanation: Preserves Pidgeotto but does not solve Rock weakness cleanly.
actions.name: Switch to Noctowl
actions.public_tradeoff: May be too passive for Falkner.

actions.explanation: Safe visible STAB into Geodude's resistance; likely low damage.
actions.name: Gust
actions.public_tradeoff: Looks normal, but ignores the public Rock-risk prior.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Do not treat a visible type advantage as complete safety when a common early Rock threat is public-plausible.

actions.explanation: Potentially scary if Quilava cannot punish, but Fire pressure is visible.
actions.name: Swords Dance
actions.public_tradeoff: May feel like a throw if Ember is obvious.

actions.explanation: Priority chip if Scyther is trying to avoid a low-HP race.
actions.name: Quick Attack
actions.public_tradeoff: Weak if Quilava is not in range.

actions.explanation: Preserves Scyther but switches into the same Fire pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Ledian
actions.public_tradeoff: Probably too defensive and not useful.

actions.explanation: Cash damage before Quilava can punish Scyther.
actions.name: Wing Attack
actions.public_tradeoff: Straightforward tempo play.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Teach when a boss should stop setting up because a publicly revealed threat already has tempo.

actions.explanation: Keeps pressure without locking Miltank into a bad sequence.
actions.name: Body Slam
actions.public_tradeoff: Less iconic but safer.

actions.explanation: Preserves the ace while scouting whether Geodude has real damage.
actions.name: Milk Drink
actions.public_tradeoff: Can feel cheap if spammed at high HP.

actions.explanation: Avoids Ground risk, but gives up Miltank's pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Girafarig
actions.public_tradeoff: A rare switch may feel smart; repeated switches may not.

actions.explanation: Iconic snowball line, but Rock resistance and Magnitude risk are public.
actions.name: Rollout
actions.public_tradeoff: May be exciting or too robotic depending on taste.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Separate iconic pressure from bad Rollout locking when Rock/Ground danger is public.

actions.explanation: Raises evasion before the player has shown a punish.
actions.name: Double Team
actions.public_tradeoff: High risk of feeling cheap.

actions.explanation: Simple chip that preserves the tutorial-like tone.
actions.name: DoubleSlap
actions.public_tradeoff: May be too weak to feel prepared.

actions.explanation: Targets a likely support pattern if Bayleef reveals it.
actions.name: Encore
actions.public_tradeoff: Smart when timed; bad if blind-spammed.

actions.explanation: Reliable speed control into a bulky starter.
actions.name: Thunder Wave
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong, readable early utility.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Capture whether early utility moves should punish setup attempts or just take simple damage.

actions.explanation: Direct STAB pressure into a Psychic-type.
actions.name: Shadow Ball
actions.public_tradeoff: Clean and explainable.

actions.explanation: Long-game pressure that may waste a low-HP ace turn.
actions.name: Spikes
actions.public_tradeoff: Probably too slow here.

actions.explanation: Preserves Gengar, but risks another Ghost into Psychic pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Misdreavus
actions.public_tradeoff: Defensive but readable.

actions.explanation: Punishes an obvious KO attempt while Gengar is low.
actions.name: Destiny Bond
actions.public_tradeoff: Scary if occasional; cheap if overused.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Decide when Destiny Bond is scary-good versus cheap or wasteful.

actions.explanation: Status pressure into a bulky bird before it controls tempo.
actions.name: Hypnosis
actions.public_tradeoff: Leader-flavored but accuracy-dependent.

actions.explanation: Ghost pressure at the cost of Haunter's HP.
actions.name: Curse
actions.public_tradeoff: Can look dramatic or wasteful.

actions.explanation: Escalates to the ace early.
actions.name: Switch to Gengar
actions.public_tradeoff: May be too eager.

actions.explanation: Reliable fixed damage without status swing.
actions.name: Night Shade
actions.public_tradeoff: Fair but less threatening.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Label how often sleep should be the correct scary line instead of a cheap default.

actions.explanation: Super-effective Rock hit into Fire with real KO pressure at Quilava's current HP.
actions.name: Rock Slide
actions.public_tradeoff: Stronger damage line, but less accurate than Earthquake.

actions.explanation: Rejects setup or switch patterns but gives up damage.
actions.name: Roar
actions.public_tradeoff: Defensive Jasmine flavor.

actions.explanation: Preserves Steelix but may overreact to reduced Fire chip.
actions.name: Switch to Skarmory
actions.public_tradeoff: Likely too conservative unless Fire Blast risk dominates.

actions.explanation: Accurate neutral hit into a Fire-type whose revealed Flame Wheel is not enough to force Steelix out.
actions.name: Earthquake
actions.public_tradeoff: Reliable but much weaker than Rock Slide here.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Teach Jasmine to stay patient into reduced Fire chip while still respecting stronger public Fire coverage.

actions.explanation: Direct damage without committing to stall.
actions.name: Steel Wing
actions.public_tradeoff: Probably low impact.

actions.explanation: Starts a clock on a bulky physical threat.
actions.name: Toxic
actions.public_tradeoff: Classic stall pressure.

actions.explanation: Deletes a setup line before it snowballs.
actions.name: Whirlwind
actions.public_tradeoff: Smart if setup is real; annoying if reflexive.

actions.explanation: A defensive pivot that may invite Fire pressure later.
actions.name: Switch to Forretress
actions.public_tradeoff: Team-plan move, not immediate punish.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Label whether phazing a setup threat feels like good defense or slow stall.

actions.explanation: Preserves Cloyster and moves into a bulky answer.
actions.name: Switch to Slowking
actions.public_tradeoff: Conservative Pryce line.

actions.explanation: Scouts and burns a turn at low HP.
actions.name: Protect
actions.public_tradeoff: May be stally without hail or poison.

actions.explanation: Trades Cloyster for a major tempo swing.
actions.name: Explosion
actions.public_tradeoff: Needs taste labeling for cheapness.

actions.explanation: Clean Water punish into Quilava.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong and fair.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Decide when Explosion is dramatic, fair, or cheap in a gym-leader fight.

actions.explanation: Ground pivot into a revealed Electric attack.
actions.name: Switch to Piloswine
actions.public_tradeoff: Prepared and fair if based on public typing.

actions.explanation: Preserves Slowking if it expects a weaker turn.
actions.name: Rest
actions.public_tradeoff: Likely bad into Electric pressure.

actions.explanation: Speed control if Slowking can take the hit.
actions.name: Thunder Wave
actions.public_tradeoff: Good utility if not too greedy.

actions.explanation: Neutral damage while staying in against Electric pressure.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: Simple but risky.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Teach when a Water/Psychic wall should respect Electric pressure and pivot to a Ground type.

actions.explanation: Pivots into Clair's ace and handles Water/Ice pressure better.
actions.name: Switch to Kingdra
actions.public_tradeoff: Smart if Clair values Kingdra as her ace.

actions.explanation: Water-resistant pivot with different risks.
actions.name: Switch to Mantine
actions.public_tradeoff: Defensive but public-info legal.

actions.explanation: Commits Dragonair into a lock while Ice coverage is plausible.
actions.name: Outrage
actions.public_tradeoff: May be too reckless.

actions.explanation: Punishes Water typing immediately if Dragonair stays in.
actions.name: Thunder
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong but risks hidden Ice coverage.

partial_candidates.training_focus: The Suicune/Ice Beam test: the AI should respect public meta coverage before it is revealed.

actions.explanation: Sets up a sweep if Kingdra survives the next hit.
actions.name: Dragon Dance
actions.public_tradeoff: Scary-good or greedy depending on HP taste.

actions.explanation: Neutral coverage with freeze chance.
actions.name: Ice Beam
actions.public_tradeoff: May be the boring safe line.

actions.explanation: Commits to damage and lock-in.
actions.name: Outrage
actions.public_tradeoff: Aggressive Clair line.

actions.explanation: Reliable chip in a Water mirror.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: Low drama but safe.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Label when Clair should spend a turn on Dragon Dance instead of taking damage now.

actions.explanation: Immediate damage before Alakazam can Recover or attack.
actions.name: Wing Attack
actions.public_tradeoff: Tempo-first Koga line.

actions.explanation: Disruption into a dangerous attacker.
actions.name: Confuse Ray
actions.public_tradeoff: Swingy and potentially annoying.

actions.explanation: Publicly strong Psychic answer if Umbreon is known.
actions.name: Switch to Umbreon
actions.public_tradeoff: Smart preservation line.

actions.explanation: Starts the poison clock.
actions.name: Toxic
actions.public_tradeoff: Very Koga, but maybe greedy.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Capture Koga's poison-clock identity without ignoring immediate Psychic pressure.

actions.explanation: Greedy setup into a Pokemon likely to carry Ice coverage.
actions.name: Dragon Dance
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong if Suicune lacks Ice Beam; catastrophic if it has it.

actions.explanation: Coverage that avoids Outrage lock but is weaker into Suicune.
actions.name: Earthquake
actions.public_tradeoff: Keeps options open at the cost of pressure.

actions.explanation: Commits to immediate chip and probes whether Suicune stays for Ice coverage.
actions.name: Outrage
actions.public_tradeoff: Damage plus information, but locks Dragonite.

actions.explanation: Water-resistant pivot that still fears Electric coverage.
actions.name: Switch to Gyarados
actions.public_tradeoff: Useful scout if Electric risk is low.

actions.explanation: Preserves Dragonite and handles Water/Ice pressure better than most dragons.
actions.name: Switch to Kingdra
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong preservation line if Lance values the ace.

actions.explanation: Preserves Dragonite while resisting some neutral chip, but hates Surf.
actions.name: Switch to Steelix
actions.public_tradeoff: Bad if Suicune simply attacks with Water.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Lance's current Dragon-heavy roster decides whether Dragonite should set up, chip, or pivot around public Ice coverage.

actions.explanation: Presses damage into Meganium without relying on Water.
actions.name: Psychic
actions.public_tradeoff: Tempo-focused ace play.

actions.explanation: Rain-boosted STAB into a Grass resist.
actions.name: Hydro Pump
actions.public_tradeoff: Big but likely inefficient.

actions.explanation: Bulky pivot with Ice Beam pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Lapras
actions.public_tradeoff: Smart if preserving Starmie is the priority.

actions.explanation: Preserves Starmie while rain remains active.
actions.name: Recover
actions.public_tradeoff: Correct at low HP; annoying if automatic.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Decide when a fast ace should Recover versus press coverage into a Grass threat.

actions.explanation: Controls the wall before it can Rest or Curse.
actions.name: Sleep Powder
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong status line; taste decides cheapness.

actions.explanation: Immediate strong neutral hit.
actions.name: Sludge Bomb
actions.public_tradeoff: Simple pressure.

actions.explanation: Attempts to break through with Muscle Band pressure.
actions.name: Swords Dance
actions.public_tradeoff: Scary if Snorlax cannot punish.

actions.explanation: Special pressure and Explosion threat later.
actions.name: Switch to Exeggutor
actions.public_tradeoff: May reveal too much too early.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Label Erika's grass-control style against a bulky normal wall.

actions.explanation: Neutral coverage with freeze chance.
actions.name: Ice Punch
actions.public_tradeoff: Safe but lower identity.

actions.explanation: Neutral coverage without locking into a failed Psychic.
actions.name: ThunderPunch
actions.public_tradeoff: Readable adaptation.

actions.explanation: Bulky status pivot away from Dark pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Hypno
actions.public_tradeoff: Defensive champion-level play.

actions.explanation: Highest identity move but bad into a public Dark type.
actions.name: Psychic
actions.public_tradeoff: Too robotic if chosen blindly.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Teach a late-game ace not to autopick Psychic into a public Dark answer.

actions.explanation: Starts poison pressure before Pidgey can chip Ariados or pivot out.
actions.name: Toxic
actions.public_tradeoff: Status tempo can be correct, but it gives Pidgey a free attack if damage matters now.

actions.explanation: Sustain damage that keeps Ariados healthy if the matchup is not immediately dangerous.
actions.name: Giga Drain
actions.public_tradeoff: Neutral into Pidgey in this hack, but better if the player pivots to a Rock or Ground answer.

actions.explanation: Uses Ariados's Bug STAB for direct damage and recovery.
actions.name: Leech Life
actions.public_tradeoff: Resisted into Pidgey, so it may read as low-tempo.

actions.explanation: Small chip with a poison chance while avoiding a full status turn.
actions.name: Poison Sting
actions.public_tradeoff: Low impact unless poison lands.

actions.explanation: Preserves Ariados and brings in Bugsy's ace against the public Flying matchup.
actions.name: Switch to Scyther
actions.public_tradeoff: Aggressive pivot, but it exposes Scyther early.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Bugsy's opener should decide between Toxic pressure, weak chip, and preserving Ariados when a Flying threat is public.

actions.explanation: Preserves Slowbro and resists Houndoom's Dark/Fire pressure.
actions.name: Switch to Houndoom
actions.public_tradeoff: Conservative mirror pivot that gives up immediate Surf pressure.

actions.explanation: Raises Slowbro's special bulk.
actions.name: Amnesia
actions.public_tradeoff: Correct defensive axis, but spending the turn may still lose tempo into fast Crunch.

actions.explanation: Secondary STAB from Slowbro's current set.
actions.name: Psychic
actions.public_tradeoff: Worse than Surf into Houndoom.

actions.explanation: Super-effective STAB into Houndoom.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: Cleanest direct answer if Slowbro stays in.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Setup against a fast Dark/Crunch threat is a tempo trap even though Amnesia boosts the correct defensive stat.

actions.explanation: Direct poison STAB into Snorlax.
actions.name: Sludge Bomb
actions.public_tradeoff: A live attack after the hazard stack is complete.

actions.explanation: Neutral Water coverage.
actions.name: Surf
actions.public_tradeoff: A live move, though less aligned with Qwilfish's Poison pressure.

actions.explanation: Sacrifices Qwilfish for material.
actions.name: Explosion
actions.public_tradeoff: Can be held until the completed hazard stack creates a better use.

actions.explanation: Preserves Qwilfish and brings in Janine's spinner.
actions.name: Switch to Tentacruel
actions.public_tradeoff: Conservative, but at least avoids a failed Spikes click.

actions.explanation: Attempts a fourth local Spikes layer.
actions.name: Spikes
actions.public_tradeoff: Fails once three layers are already set.

partial_candidates.training_focus: When three Spikes layers already exist, Janine's Qwilfish must stop clicking Spikes and use a live move.

actions.explanation: Direct chip with paralysis chance into a faster Recover user.
actions.name: Body Slam
actions.public_tradeoff: Keeps tempo and can enable later setup.

actions.explanation: Atk+Def setup while Psychic pressure is special.
actions.name: Curse
actions.public_tradeoff: Potentially greedy before paralysis or chip.

actions.explanation: Full heal if Snorlax is truly losing the trade.
actions.name: Rest
actions.public_tradeoff: Too early at high HP.

actions.explanation: Only useful while asleep.
actions.name: Sleep Talk
actions.public_tradeoff: Public fail if used awake.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Red's current Snorlax no longer has Amnesia or Self-Destruct; teach Curse versus direct Body Slam under Psychic/Recover pressure.

actions.explanation: Disables a bulky Ice-risk target before it can punish.
actions.name: Sleep Powder
actions.public_tradeoff: Strong but accuracy-dependent.

actions.explanation: Immediate super-effective sustain damage.
actions.name: Giga Drain
actions.public_tradeoff: Keeps tempo if sleep risk is not worth it.

actions.explanation: Attempts to snowball Yanma through speed and special pressure.
actions.name: Quiver Dance
actions.public_tradeoff: Greedy if Lapras has Ice coverage.

actions.explanation: Preserves Yanma and handles Water/Ice pressure better.
actions.name: Switch to Kingdra
actions.public_tradeoff: Conservative champion pivot.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Yanma is now on Lance's Dragon roster; compare legal sleep pressure against greedy Quiver Dance into Ice risk.

actions.explanation: Uses the sleep window to make Earthquake strong enough to trade through Snorlax.
actions.name: Curse
actions.public_tradeoff: Excellent if the wake branch still leaves Rhydon favored; bad if wake timing or a hidden move flips the exchange.

actions.explanation: Immediate damage into sleeping Snorlax.
actions.name: Earthquake
actions.public_tradeoff: Keeps tempo but may fail to convert before Snorlax wakes.

actions.explanation: Useful for Zapdos or Moltres, but weak into the active Snorlax.
actions.name: Rock Slide
actions.public_tradeoff: Only makes sense on a strong Flying-type switch read.

actions.explanation: Preserves Rhydon and keeps a final special route available.
actions.name: Switch to Zapdos
actions.public_tradeoff: Gives the sleeping Snorlax a chance to wake without forcing progress.

partial_candidates.training_focus: Turn a preserved but sleeping Snorlax into a concrete setup-window test: Curse is strong only because wake timing, hazards, and Rhydon's KO route have been tracked.
